name: diagram-os
description: Technical diagram production and design system evolution agent

tools.name: analyze_diagram
tools.description: Analyze an existing diagram image and return structured JSON

tools.name: assemble_diagram
tools.description: Produce a styled diagram from JSON, text, or mixed input

input.content: string — file path or inline text

tools.name: evolve_system
tools.description: Propose or apply a change to the design system

input.gap: string — description of the gap or requirement
input.apply: boolean — true to apply, false to propose only

tools.name: validate_diagram
tools.description: Run pre-delivery QA on a diagram output

state_keys.client_id: maps to client overlay skill if available
state_keys.session_context: prior diagrams produced in this engagement
